'''''Erinnic''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]].
It was commanded by [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Ark Poinard]] from the days of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], when it carried only [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]]. His trademark send off, despite the anti-[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] policies of the Empire, was [[May the Force be with you/Legends|"May the Force be with you!"]]. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] had a [[Gender/Legends|female]] officer in its command crew.

During the [[Battle of Ord Mantell (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Ord Mantell]], ''Erinnic'' led the fleet commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Yald Sutel]] dispatched on the information of [[Elan]] that the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] would target [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] next. Ambushing the Yuuzhan Vong from behind the fifth [[Planet/Legends|planet]], the rest of the fleet began the assault, waiting for the ''Erinnic'' to move out from between Ord Mantell's [[Moon/Legends|moons]], forcing the Yuuzhan Vong command ship towards the [[Jubilee Wheel (space station)|Jubilee Wheel]], and then out of the [[Star system/Legends|system]].
